description: Your retreat includes access to amazing activities. From surfing Atlantic waves to exploring ancient medinas, every day brings new adventures and unforgettable experiences.

activities.title: Surf Lessons
activities.description: Ride the perfect waves of Morocco's Atlantic coast with expert instructors. All levels welcome, from beginners to advanced surfers.

activities.title: Rooftop Yoga
activities.description: Start or end your day with peaceful yoga sessions on our rooftop terrace. Sunrise and sunset classes with ocean views.

activities.title: Cooking Classes
activities.description: Learn authentic Moroccan recipes in a traditional kitchen. From market visits to tagine mastery, cook like a local.

activities.title: Belly Dancing
activities.description: Experience the joy of traditional belly dancing with our talented instructors. Fun, empowering, and culturally enriching.

activities.title: Paradise Valley
activities.description: Day trip to the stunning Paradise Valley oasis. Crystal-clear pools, waterfalls, and breathtaking natural beauty.

activities.title: Sandboarding
activities.description: Adventure in Timlalin sand dunes. Experience the thrill of sandboarding down massive golden dunes.

activities.title: Medina Tours
activities.description: Explore authentic Moroccan souks and medinas. Discover local culture, crafts, and hidden gems with a guide.

activities.title: Healing Sessions
activities.description: Reiki, sound baths, meditation, and holistic healing. Restore balance and find inner peace.

cta.title: Create Your Perfect Retreat
cta.description: Mix and match activities to design your ideal Moroccan experience. Every package includes multiple activities—you choose your adventure.
